1b:I[52157,["/_next/static/chunks/2103ba8a730d1b6d.js","/_next/static/chunks/c1929d08ea3c25d0.js","/_next/static/chunks/51e6b3dbff2338aa.js","/_next/static/chunks/8a7a4cd92fbaac74.js","/_next/static/chunks/16055764293742b6.js"],"PreloadChunks"]
13:[["$","$L1b",null,{"moduleIds":["9427107997415843456"]}],"$L1c"]
1d:I[71031,["/_next/static/chunks/2103ba8a730d1b6d.js","/_next/static/chunks/c1929d08ea3c25d0.js","/_next/static/chunks/51e6b3dbff2338aa.js","/_next/static/chunks/8a7a4cd92fbaac74.js","/_next/static/chunks/16055764293742b6.js"],"default"]
1e:T4b3,Asphalt shingles remain the most popular roofing material in America, and for good reason. They offer excellent value, versatility, and reliable performance at an affordable price point. S NEW ROOF provides expert asphalt shingle roofing services using quality products from leading manufacturers like GAF, Owens Corning, and CertainTeed.

Modern asphalt shingles come in a wide variety of styles and colors. From traditional 3-tab shingles to architectural and designer shingles that mimic the look of wood shake or slate, there's an option for every home style and budget. Architectural shingles provide enhanced durability and a dimensional look that adds curb appeal.

Quality installation is critical for shingle roof performance. Our certified crews follow manufacturer specifications and industry best practices for nail placement, underlayment, flashing, and ventilation. This attention to detail ensures your shingle roof performs well for its expected lifespan of 20-30 years.

As a GAF Master Elite Contractor, we can offer extended warranty coverage that protects your investment. Combined with our workmanship warranty, you'll have complete peace of mind knowing your roof is built to last.1f:T45e,Clay tile roofing has been used for centuries and remains one of the most beautiful and durable roofing options available. The distinctive Mediterranean look of clay tiles complements many Southern California homes, from Spanish Colonial to Italianate and modern designs.

Clay tiles offer exceptional longevity, with many roofs lasting 50-100 years or more. The tiles themselves are extremely durable, resistant to fire, insects, and rot. While the underlayment may need replacement after 20-30 years, the tiles can be reused, making clay tile an environmentally sustainable choice.

The natural thermal properties of clay help regulate indoor temperatures, reducing cooling costs in warm climates like Orange County. Clay tiles are also recyclable at the end of their long life, further reducing environmental impact.

Installation of clay tile roofing requires specialized expertise. Proper fastening, spacing, and overlap are critical for performance. Our experienced installers follow manufacturer specifications and industry best practices to ensure your clay tile roof provides decades of protection and beauty.20:T425,Metal roofing has become increasingly popular for Orange County homeowners seeking exceptional durability, energy efficiency, and modern aesthetics. Today's metal roofs offer sleek, contemporary looks or classic styles that complement any architectural design.

Metal roofs are incredibly durable, withstanding high winds, heavy rain, and even hail. They're non-combustible, providing excellent fire protection for your home. Many insurance companies offer discounts for homes with metal roofs due to their superior resistance to damage.

One of the biggest advantages of metal roofing is energy efficiency. Metal roofs reflect solar radiant heat, which can reduce cooling costs by 10-25%. Cool roof coatings and lighter colors further enhance this benefit, making metal an excellent choice for California's warm climate.

With proper installation, a metal roof can last 40-70 years or more with minimal maintenance. Available in various materials including steel, aluminum, copper, and zinc, metal roofs offer options for every budget and aesthetic preference.21:T422,Flat roofing requires specialized knowledge and materials to ensure proper water drainage and long-term performance. S NEW ROOF provides expert flat roofing services for residential and commercial properties throughout Orange County.

Modern flat roofing systems have evolved significantly, offering excellent durability and weather resistance. We work with multiple flat roofing technologies including TPO (thermoplastic polyolefin), modified bitumen, and built-up roofing systems, recommending the best solution for your specific needs.

Proper drainage is critical for flat roofs. We design and install systems that ensure water flows properly to drains, preventing ponding that can lead to premature deterioration. This includes tapered insulation systems and strategically placed drains.

Flat roofs offer advantages including easier maintenance access, space for HVAC equipment, and potential for rooftop decks or solar installations. Our flat roofing solutions are designed to maximize these benefits while providing reliable, long-lasting protection.1c:["$","$L1d",null,{"roofingType":{"slug":"asphalt-shingle-roofing","name":"Asphalt Shingle Roofing","nameEs":"Techos de Tejas Asfálticas","shortDescription":"Affordable, versatile roofing with wide style options for every home.","shortDescriptionEs":"Techos asequibles y versátiles con muchas opciones de estilo.","description":"Professional asphalt shingle roofing services in Orange County. cumbreras y ventilación."}],"faqs":[{"question":"How long do asphalt shingles last?","questionEs":"¿Cuánto duran las tejas asfálticas?","answer":"Quality asphalt shingles typically last 20-30 years, Proper installation and ventilation are key to maximizing lifespan.","answerEs":"Las tejas asfálticas de calidad típicamente duran 20-30 años, con tejas arquitectónicas premium durando hasta 50 años. Opciones resistentes al impacto manejan tormentas ocasionales."}],"image":"/shingle-roof.png","lifespan":"20-30 years","priceRange":"$$$"},"otherTypes":[{"slug":"clay-tile-roofing","name":"Clay Tile Roofing","nameEs":"Techos de Tejas de Arcilla","shortDescription":"Beautiful, timeless roofing with exceptional durability and Mediterranean charm.","shortDescriptionEs":"Techos hermosos y atemporales con durabilidad excepcional y encanto mediterráneo.","description":"Expert clay tile roofing services in Orange County. We assess your home's structural capacity during consultation. Most homes built for tile roofs can accommodate them without modification.","answerEs":"Las tejas de arcilla son más pesadas que otros materiales de techado. Evaluamos la capacidad estructural de su hogar durante la consulta. La mayoría de los hogares construidos para techos de tejas pueden acomodarlos sin modificación."},{"question":"How long does a clay tile roof last?","questionEs":"¿Cuánto dura un techo de tejas de arcilla?","answer":"Clay tiles can last 50-100+ years. Over the life of the roof, clay can be more cost-effective due to its exceptional lifespan and low maintenance.","answerEs":"El techo de tejas de arcilla tiene un costo inicial más alto que las tejas asfálticas pero ofrece longevidad superior. Durante la vida útil del techo, la arcilla puede ser más rentable debido a su vida útil excepcional y bajo mantenimiento."}],"image":"/tile-roof.png","lifespan":"50-100+ years","priceRange":"$$$$"},{"slug":"metal-roofing","name":"Metal Roofing","nameEs":"Techos de Metal","shortDescription":"Premium, energy-efficient roofing with exceptional durability and modern aesthetics.","shortDescriptionEs":"Techos premium y energéticamente eficientes con durabilidad excepcional y estética moderna.","description":"Professional metal roofing services in Orange County. In fact, many homeowners enjoy the gentle sound of rain on a metal roof.","answerEs":"Los techos de metal modernos con aislamiento adecuado y entablado sólido no son más ruidosos que otros tipos de techado. De hecho, muchos propietarios disfrutan del suave sonido de la lluvia en un techo de metal."},{"question":"Do metal roofs attract lightning?","questionEs":"¿Los techos de metal atraen rayos?","answer":"Metal roofs do not attract lightning. In fact, they're safer because metal is non-combustible and can dissipate a lightning strike safely if one does occur.","answerEs":"Los techos de metal no atraen rayos. De hecho, son más seguros porque el metal es no combustible y puede disipar un rayo de manera segura si ocurre uno."},{"question":"Is metal roofing energy efficient?","questionEs":"¿Es eficiente energéticamente el techado de metal?","answer":"Yes!
